response.original_title: 寝取らせ串刺し輪姦 愛する妻を深奥まで犯し尽くして下さい―。  安みなみ
response.overview: I couldn't say it for so long. My desire for my beloved wife, Minami, to be gang-raped by strangers... But I couldn't continue our married life with this thought. That's why I confessed my desire to cuckold her to her, and handed over the hesitant Minami to a group of middle-aged men. My wife being violated orally and vaginally, surrounded by men... It was a sight that could only be described as "impaling," and I felt an abnormal excitement at this surreal scene. And gradually, Minami also began to feel pleasure...
response.title: 寝取らせ串刺し輪姦 愛する妻を深奥まで犯し尽くして下さい―。  安みなみ
